testCases.name: happy path - bot processes queue item successfully
testCases.description: Task added to UiPath queue. Webhook intermediate catch event receives transactionCompleted message. Item processed successfully.

testCases.name: bot item abandoned - manual review, item processed manually
testCases.description: Task added to queue. Webhook receives transactionAbandoned status. Error caught by boundary on sub-process. Agent reviews queue item info, decides to manually handle. ManualTask and Activity_1umb1rv auto-execute. Process ends.

_integrationTestNotes: Integration tests should verify: (1) Activity_118pfe1 (add task to queue) calls real UiPath Orchestrator API and confirms item is queued; (2) Event_16yd83w (webhook intermediate catch event, message name '36a59b39-c6d5-41e6-aa34-bd805badab31') receives real UiPath status callbacks — correlationKey is queueItemId; (3) Activity_1dibkd5 (revert RPA job) is a compensation handler (isForCompensation=true) triggered by compensation events, not directly accessible via CPT assertions — test via integration with real UiPath Orchestrator; (4) Activity_0svfozj (get queue item info) and Activity_0hztmxc (manually review queue item) are reached via boundary timer on Activity_1ko88ft in real environment; (5) Error boundary Event_04itckl on Activity_118pfe1 is a compensation boundary (not error) — compensation path requires real UiPath failure scenario. Note: Event_08710ws is an ERROR end event (errorCode=item_timed_out_or_abandoned) — when queueItemStatus=transactionAbandoned, it throws an error caught by boundary Event_16ail2y on Activity_1ko88ft → Activity_0svfozj (get queue item info). After Activity_0svfozj, Activity_0hztmxc (manualTask) and Activity_1umb1rv (manualTask) auto-execute in Zeebe. Gateway_0z2t5ph needs decision='manual' to route to the manual processing path.
